sequenceDiagram autonumber # Didn't find any way to add a class in sequenceDiagram to act as a selector. box rgba(Infra_WorkerNode) # Acts as selector to override background color as details.alert--info participant Client as Client
(Infra_LoadBalancer) participant Web3 as Oasis Web3
Gateway participant ClientN as Oasis Node
Sapphire
ParaTime Client participant Compute as Oasis Node
Sapphire ParaTime
Compute 🔒 participant KM as Oasis Node
Key Manager
🔒 end Client->>Client: Create transaction
call data opt Encrypt Transaction Client->>+Web3: Get ephemeral
public key R Web3->>+ClientN: Get ephemeral
public key R ClientN->>+KM: Get ephemeral
public key R KM->>KM: Derive per-epoch
per-runtime
keypair R, R' KM-->>-ClientN: Ephemeral public key R Note over ClientN: R is cached
until the end
of epoch ClientN-->>-Web3: Ephemeral
public key R Web3-->>-Client: Ephemeral
public key R Client->>Client: Generate X25519
keypair C, C' Client->>Client: Derive shared key
K' = X25519(Infra_RedisCache) Client->>Client: Encrypt call data
with Deoxys-II using
shared key K' Client->>Client: Attach C end Client->>Client: Sign transaction
with User's
Secp256k1/Ed25519
key Client->>+Web3: eth_sendRawTx Web3->>+ClientN: eth_sendRawTx ClientN->>ClientN: Validate
transaction ClientN->>Compute: eth_sendRawTx opt Encrypted Transaction Compute->>+KM: Get ephemeral
private key R' KM->>KM: Check runtime
policy for caller KM->>KM: Derive per-epoch
per-runtime
keypair R, R' KM-->>-Compute: Ephemeral
private key R' Compute->>Compute: Derive shared key
K' = X25519(Infra_WorkerNode) Compute->>Compute: Decrypt Deoxys-II
envelope using K' end Compute->>+KM: Get c10l contract
state keypair S, S' KM->>KM: Check runtime
policy for caller KM->>KM: Derive per-contract
per-runtime
keypair S, S' KM-->>-Compute: Contract state
keypair S, S' Compute->>Compute: Fetch contract code Compute->>Compute: C10l contract execution
using S, S' to read and
write storage Compute->>Compute: Obtain new
state root alt Encrypted Transaction Compute->>Compute: Transaction receipt:
encrypt tx status with K',
unencrypted logs else Unencrypted Transaction Compute->>Compute: Transaction receipt:
unencrypted tx status
and logs end Note over Compute: Proposer node adds
transaction, state and
receipt in new block Note over Web3: Wait for new block Web3-->>-Client: Transaction
receipt opt Encrypted Transaction Client->>Client: Decrypt tx status
from receipt
using K' end
repo_description: Oasis Sapphire - the confidential EVM-compatible ParaTime for the Oasis Network

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个Oasis Sapphire隐私交易的完整流程图，从Client发起交易到最终拿到回执。关键要体现加密交易的可选路径，以及Key Manager和Compute节点的交互。
明白。我注意到这里有Infra_LoadBalancer和Infra_WorkerNode的背景色需求，是要把Client和Compute节点所在的box做成selector样式来覆盖背景色吗？还有RedisCache是做什么用的？
对，Client那个box用Infra_LoadBalancer的rgba色值，Compute所在的box用Infra_WorkerNode的。RedisCache不用画出来，那是我在注释里写的笔误，实际流程里Client自己用X25519做密钥派生就行。
好的，我把五个参与者放进一个box里，Client标注为Infra_LoadBalancer，Web3 Gateway、ClientN、Compute和Key Manager依次排列。现在开始画主流程：Client先自己创建交易调用数据。
接下来是可选的加密分支。如果用户选择加密，Client要向Web3 Gateway请求临时公钥R，这个请求会层层传递到Key Manager。Key Manager派生每epoch每runtime的密钥对R和R'，然后一路返回。注意ClientN要把R缓存到epoch结束。
加密分支画好了，包括Client生成X25519密钥对C和C'，派生共享密钥K'，用Deoxys-II加密调用数据，然后附上C。接下来Client签名交易，用Secp256k1或Ed25519，然后发送eth_sendRawTx到Web3 Gateway。
等等，签名那里要强调是User的密钥，不是Client节点自己的。然后ClientN验证完交易后转发给Compute节点。这里又有一个加密分支：如果是加密交易，Compute需要向Key Manager获取临时私钥R'来解密。
收到，我把签名标注改成User's key。Compute获取R'的分支里，Key Manager要先检查runtime policy，然后派生密钥对。Compute拿到R'后派生共享密钥K'，用Deoxys-II解密。这里K'的派生应该是X25519(C, R')对吧？不是WorkerNode。
对，是X25519(C, R')，之前注释写错了。接下来Compute要向Key Manager获取c10l合约的状态密钥对S和S'，同样需要检查policy，然后派生每合约每runtime的密钥。之后Compute获取合约代码，执行保密合约，用S和S'读写存储，得到新的state root。
执行部分画好了。最后交易回执这里，需要区分加密和非加密两种情况：加密的话用K'加密tx status，日志不加密；非加密则都不加密。然后Proposer节点把交易、状态和回执打包进新区块。
最后Web3 Gateway等待新区块，把交易回执返回给Client。如果是加密交易，Client还需要用K'解密tx status。整个流程就结束了。记得加上两个note：Compute那里标注Proposer节点打包区块，Web3那里标注等待新区块。
都画完了。我检查一下：五个参与者在带背景色的box里，加密分支有两个opt块，执行阶段有alt分支处理回执加密，所有密钥派生和加密算法都标注清楚了，两个note也加上了。流程从创建交易到最终解密回执，完整闭环。
